raw_pool.claim: Goldman Sachs estimates $4 trillion to $8 trillion of total AI capital investment over the next five years
Goldman Sachs estimates $4 trillion to $8 trillion of total AI capital investment over the next five years
Goldman Sachs baseline model projects $7.6 trillion of cumulative AI CapEx between 2026 and 2031
Goldman Sachs baseline model implies $1.6 trillion in annual AI CapEx in 2031
Goldman Sachs baseline assumes NVIDIA accounts for 75% of total compute spend in each period
Goldman Sachs baseline assumes 5% YoY compute growth past 2031
Goldman Sachs uses VR200 chip baseline spec at $80.5K per GPU including node costs
Goldman Sachs assumes VR200 chip power consumption of 3,000 W per package
Goldman Sachs assumes $15 million per MW for data centers
Goldman Sachs assumes $2,500 per kW for new power
Goldman Sachs assumes 15% of required data center space is brownfield in 2026
Goldman Sachs assumes 30% of required data center space is brownfield in 2031
